svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/143.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/143.0.0.0" scale="1" border="5" version="29.2.4"> <diagram name="第 1 页" id="nSOitCVyQOVlCl4Sjz1o"> <mxGraphModel dx="2066" dy="1226" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="t1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1" value="Service Architecture (Conn + ConnManager + ConnBase + Channels)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="900" x="40" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cm" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=8;fontSize=13" value="ConnManager
----------------
+ Add(conn: ConnBase)
+ Remove(connId)
+ Get(connId): ConnBase
+ StartTask(conn: ConnBase)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="380" x="620" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cb" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=8;fontSize=13;dashed=1" value="ConnBase (abstract)
----------------
+ Start()
+ StartReader()
+ StartWriter()
+ ReadLoop()
+ WriteLoop()
+ TimeoutLoop()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="190" width="380" x="160" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="taskChan" parent="1" style="shape=process;rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=13;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf" value="taskChan
类型: TaskQueue / channel" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="1030" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sendChan" parent="1" style="shape=process;rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=13;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366" value="sendChan
类型: SendQueue / channel" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="220" x="1030" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="http" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=13" value="HttpConn" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="60" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ws" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=13" value="WsConn" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="240" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tcp" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=13" value="TcpConn" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="420" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kcp" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=13" value="KcpConn" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="600" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="taskg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=8;fontSize=13" value="Task 协程
(处理读/写/超时任务)
----------------
+ Run()
+ Execute(packet): result" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="260" x="1280" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sendg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=8;fontSize=13" value="Send 协程
(发送队列/回传)
----------------
+ Run()
+ Enqueue(result)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="260" x="1280" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sp" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=8;fontSize=13" value="ServerPort (监听端口)
----------------
+ Accept()
+ CreateConn(): ConnBase

端口类型: http / ws / tcp / kcp" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="380" x="620" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=2;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=8;fontSize=12" value="1) 建连流程
- Client 通过端口建立连接
- ServerPort 创建不同 Conn (Http/Ws/Tcp/Kcp)
- Conn 存入 ConnManager
- 启动 Conn 的 Task 协程处理读/写/超时" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="610" x="40" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=2;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=8;fontSize=12" value="2) 数据流转顺序
StartReader 捕获 packet
 -> taskChan (channel)
 -> Task 协程 执行业务
 -> sendChan (channel)
 -> Send 协程
 -> StartWriter 回传给客户端" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="860" x="680" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_http" edge="1" parent="1" source="http" style="endArrow=block;endFill=0;endSize=18;strokeWidth=2;html=1" target="cb"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_ws" edge="1" parent="1" source="ws" style="endArrow=block;endFill=0;endSize=18;strokeWidth=2;html=1" target="cb"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_tcp" edge="1" parent="1" source="tcp" style="endArrow=block;endFill=0;endSize=18;strokeWidth=2;html=1" target="cb"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_kcp" edge="1" parent="1" source="kcp" style="endArrow=block;endFill=0;endSize=18;strokeWidth=2;html=1" target="cb"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_mgr_conn" edge="1" parent="1" source="cm" style="endArrow=diamond;endFill=1;strokeWidth=2;html=1" target="cb" value="manage/hold 1..*"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_cb_taskChan" edge="1" parent="1" source="cb" style="endArrow=open;strokeWidth=2;html=1" target="taskChan" value="push packet"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_cb_sendChan_hint" edge="1" parent="1" source="taskg" style="endArrow=open;dashed=1;strokeWidth=1;html=1" target="sendChan" value="push result"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_taskChan_taskg" edge="1" parent="1" source="taskChan" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;strokeWidth=2;html=1" target="taskg" value="consume"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_sendChan_sendg" edge="1" parent="1" source="sendChan" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;strokeWidth=2;html=1" target="sendg" value="consume"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_port_conn" edge="1" parent="1" source="sp" style="endArrow=open;strokeWidth=2;html=1" target="cb" value="CreateConn()"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_port_mgr" edge="1" parent="1" source="sp" style="endArrow=open;strokeWidth=2;html=1" target="cm" value="Add(conn)
StartTask(conn)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
ConnManager
----------------
+ Add(conn: ConnBase)
+ Remove(connId)
+ Get(connId): ConnBase
+ StartTask(conn: ConnBase)

----------------
+ Start()
+ StartReader()
+ StartWriter()
+ ReadLoop()
+ WriteLoop()
+ TimeoutLoop()

div.div:
Task 协程
(处理读/写/超时任务)
----------------
+ Run()
+ Execute(packet): result

(发送队列/回传)
----------------
+ Run()
+ Enqueue(result)

div.div:
ServerPort (监听端口)
----------------
+ Accept()
+ CreateConn(): ConnBase
端口类型: http / ws / tcp / kcp

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 598px; height: 1px; padding-top: 470px; margin-left: 18px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
1) 建连流程
- Client 通过端口建立连接
- ServerPort 创建不同 Conn (Http/Ws/Tcp/Kcp)
- Conn 存入 ConnManager
- 启动 Conn 的 Task 协程处理读/写/超时

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 848px; height: 1px; padding-top: 470px; margin-left: 658px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
2) 数据流转顺序
StartReader 捕获 packet
-> taskChan (channel)
-> Task 协程 执行业务
-> sendChan (channel)
-> Send 协程
-> StartWriter 回传给客户端
